title: Refactor Panel UI with ui-ux-pro-max Guidelines
description: Refactor packages/ccc-state-controller/panel/index.js applying ui-ux-pro-max design guidelines while preserving Editor.Panel.extend() pattern for Cocos Creator 2.x compatibility. Extract inline CSS following dark theme conventions, improve accessibility (4.5:1 contrast ratio), add cursor-pointer to interactive elements. Reference ccc-smart-component-manager/panel/logic.js for modern patterns.

criteria: All interactive elements have cursor-pointer style
Text contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 (verify with accessibility tool)
No emoji icons - use SVG or text only
Editor.Panel.extend() pattern preserved (no structural changes to extend call)
Panel functionality unchanged: install/update/validate/uninstall buttons work
convergence.definition_of_done: Panel UI follows ui-ux-pro-max guidelines with improved accessibility while maintaining Cocos Creator 2.x compatibility

files.change: Refactor CSS styles for accessibility, add cursor-pointer, improve contrast, organize style sections

implementation.title: Analyze current panel structure
implementation.description: Review existing panel/index.js to understand current CSS structure, interactive elements, and identify accessibility issues
modification_points: Identify all interactive elements without cursor-pointer
Check contrast ratios for text elements
List all current CSS classes and their purposes
logic_flow: Identify ui-button, ui-input, and clickable elements
Document current color values for contrast analysis

implementation.title: Apply ui-ux-pro-max design improvements
implementation.description: Refactor CSS styles following ui-ux-pro-max guidelines: add cursor-pointer, improve contrast, organize sections
modification_points: Add cursor: pointer to all ui-button selectors (lines ~90-130)
Organize CSS into logical sections with comments
Ensure focus states have visible outlines
logic_flow: Apply cursor-pointer to ui-button, .button-group button elements
Reorganize CSS: base styles, components, states, utilities

implementation.title: Verify panel functionality
implementation.description: Test panel in Cocos Creator to ensure all buttons and interactions still work after refactoring
logic_flow: Click each button and verify IPC messages sent
Verify visual appearance matches design intent

pre_analysis.action: Load context package for artifact paths
Load ui-ux-pro-max skill for design guidelines
Load smart-component-manager panel for modern pattern reference

artifacts.usage: Design guidelines for accessibility, contrast, cursor styles
Reference implementation for modern panel patterns

rationale.preserve_pattern: Editor.Panel.extend() is required for Cocos Creator 2.x compatibility
rationale.accessibility_priority: 4.5:1 contrast ratio is WCAG AA standard

risks: Cocos Creator custom elements (ui-button, ui-input) may have limited styling support - test thoroughly
